response.justification: Candidate has ~14 years of solid full-stack software engineering experience with a strong craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level Principal/IC requiring 15 years of experience plus recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms, cloud-scale strategy work, and the ability to advise strategic customers. The resume shows Senior/Staff-level individual contributions rather than Principal-level technical leadership, no advanced AI degree or notable AI products, limited cloud-architecture breadth (some AWS CDK at Optilyz), and no evidence of advising executives or shaping cross-org technical strategy.
strengths: Long, diverse full-stack track record across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at high scale
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, trunk-based dev, CI/CD, public workshops and OSS projects
concerns: No demonstrated Principal/Director-level technical leadership or strategic advisory experience
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused, lacking shipped AI products/platforms or research depth
Cloud expertise is limited to product-level AWS use, not cloud-platform strategy or architecture at scale

key_factors.factor: Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work
